name: Glazed Meatloaf
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Cracker crumbs or bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Prepare a loaf pan with cooking spray.
Combine all ingredients except ketchup and honey, and mix well. Turn the mixture into the prepared pan and bake for 40 minutes.
Combine ketchup and honey. Spread evenly over meatloaf and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
